name: Carelian Stew (Karjalanpaisti)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in butter in a hot frying pan or pot (one that is stovetop and oven-safe). It's easiest to do this in small batches.
2. Sauté the onion until softened.
3. Place all ingredients into the pot.
4. Add enough water to cover the contents.
5. Cover with lid and place in oven at 150°C.
6. Stir occasionally throughout cooking time.
7. The stew is done when the meat starts to fall apart, which should take at least three hours. However, this stew can stay in the oven for longer periods of time.
8. If there is too much liquid, remove the lid and place the pot on a hot stove to allow some water to evaporate.
9. For additional flavor, broth can be used instead of water.
10. Serve with mashed potatoes and grated carrots.
